description: A customer who previously cancelled a flight has a travel credit and wants to use it to book a new flight.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's travel credit voucher using the voucher number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the voucher and confirms its value.

nodes.task_description: Create a new booking for the customer's desired flight.
Apply the travel credit as a form of payment. If there's a remaining balance, collect it from the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully applies the credit and processes any remaining payment.
